name: Louvre Museum
description: The world's largest art museum and a historic monument in Paris, home to thousands of works including the Mona Lisa and the Venus de Milo.

name: Colosseum
description: An ancient amphitheatre in the center of Rome, the largest ever built, and an iconic symbol of Imperial Rome.

name: Sagrada Familia
description: A massive unfinished basilica designed by Antoni Gaudi, renowned for its extraordinary architecture and stunning stained glass windows.

name: British Museum
description: A public museum dedicated to human history, art, and culture, housing a permanent collection of over eight million works.

name: Statue of Liberty
description: A colossal neoclassical sculpture on Liberty Island, a universal symbol of freedom and democracy gifted by France.

name: Tokyo Disneyland
description: A world-class theme park featuring classic Disney attractions, live entertainment, and magical experiences for all ages.

name: Anne Frank House
description: A biographical museum dedicated to the Jewish wartime diarist Anne Frank, located in the canal house where she hid during World War II.

name: Grand Canyon Helicopter Tour
description: A breathtaking helicopter tour over the Grand Canyon offering panoramic aerial views of one of the world's most spectacular natural wonders.

name: Burj Khalifa Observation Deck
description: Visit the observation decks of the world's tallest building for stunning 360-degree views of Dubai's skyline and beyond.

name: Acropolis of Athens
description: An ancient citadel perched above the city of Athens, featuring the iconic Parthenon and other significant archaeological remains.

name: Sydney Harbour Bridge Climb
description: Climb to the summit of the iconic Sydney Harbour Bridge for unparalleled views of the harbour, Opera House, and city skyline.

name: Prado Museum
description: One of the world's premier art galleries, featuring masterpieces by Velazquez, Goya, El Greco, and other European masters.
